sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: WES: JP Morgan Maintains Rating, Lowers Price Target to $43.00
feed.summary: JP Morgan has maintained a "Neutral" rating on Western Midstream (WES) but lowered its price target from $44.00 to $43.00, representing a 2.27% decrease. This adjustment is part of a trend of fluctuating analyst price targets for WES over the past year, reflecting ongoing assessments of the company's market position. The average target price from 10 analysts is $41.80, suggesting a 2.73% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $43.51.

feed.title: 'Unusual' Drone Stock Orbits Buy Zone. But Keep This Score On Your Radar.
feed.summary: Unusual Machines (UMAC) stock is entering a buy zone, driven by its transition from a drone solutions firm to a high-growth defense manufacturer, a shift catalyzed by the American Security Drone Act. The company, which debuted in February 2024, has seen its Relative Strength Rating reach the elite 90-plus level, indicating strong technical performance. Investors should keep an eye on UMAC's technical strength as it continues its trajectory in the defense sector.

feed.title: BofA Finance issues capped SPY notes (BAC) with 200% upside, 15% cap
feed.summary: BofA Finance has issued a $600,000 offering of Capped Enhanced Return Notes, guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation, linked to the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY). These notes, priced on January 30, 2026, and issuing on February 4, 2026, offer a 200% upside participation up to a maximum return of 15% over an approximate 18-month term. Investors face 1:1 downside risk if the SPY declines by more than 15%.

feed.title: Cencora (NYSE: COR) EVP nets shares after 8,415-unit RSU vesting
feed.summary: Cencora (NYSE: COR) Executive Vice President Silvana Battaglia acquired 8,415 shares of Common Stock from Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) vesting on March 11, 2026. A portion of these shares, 3,673 units, were withheld at $350.30 per share to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Battaglia directly holds 23,565.808 Cencora common shares.

feed.title: Designer Brands (NYSE: DBI) grants major RSU awards to executive chairman
feed.summary: Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE: DBI) has granted its Executive Chairman and 10% owner, Jay L. Schottenstein, two significant Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) awards. These equity compensation awards, totaling 50,065 RSUs with a key date of March 28, 2027, and 194,363 RSUs with a key date of March 28, 2028, represent a contingent right to receive Class A common shares. The grants are compensation-related and do not involve a cash outlay or market transaction, aiming to increase his future equity exposure.

feed.title: Designer Brands (NYSE: DBI) executive receives new restricted stock unit grants
feed.summary: Andrea O'Donnell, EVP, COO & Brands President of Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE: DBI), received two new grants of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 11, 2026. These grants include 12,517 RSUs converting on March 28, 2027, and 33,511 RSUs converting on March 28, 2028. These awards are compensation-related and represent a contingent right to receive Class A common shares, not open-market purchases.

feed.title: Designer Brands (DBI) EVP Laura Davis receives new restricted stock unit awards
feed.summary: Designer Brands Inc. EVP Laura Davis, who is also the President of DSW Designer Shoe Warehouse, was awarded two grants of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 11, 2026. These compensation-related grants include 13,768 RSUs with an exercise and expiration date of March 28, 2027, and an additional 36,862 RSUs expiring on March 28, 2028. Each RSU represents a contingent right to receive one Class A common share, and no open-market transactions were reported in the filing.

feed.title: Fastenal eyes 900,000 sq-ft Georgia warehouse, plans to add jobs
feed.summary: Fastenal Company announced it will break ground on a new Southeast U.S. regional operations and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia. This facility, significantly larger than their current Atlanta center, is slated to open in spring 2027 and could expand to 900,000 square feet. It will incorporate advanced warehouse technologies to boost capacity and efficiency, and Fastenal plans to expand its team over the next five years to support growth and community ties.

feed.title: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) CEO uses 3,625 shares to cover tax bill
feed.summary: Joakim Weidemanis, CEO of Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), reported a disposition of 3,625 Ordinary Shares to cover tax obligations arising from equity compensation. This transaction was a tax-withholding event, not an open-market sale, with shares valued at $130.94 each. After this, Weidemanis directly holds 54,628.18 Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: (DCBO) Risk-Controlled Trading Report (DCBO:CA)
feed.summary: This report provides a risk-controlled trading analysis for Docebo Inc. (DCBO:CA), offering long-term trading plans with buy and short targets and corresponding stop-loss levels. It includes AI-generated ratings for near, mid, and long terms, with Strong, Weak, and Weak ratings respectively. The article also lists links to recent articles related to Docebo Inc.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) offers high-yield autocallable notes linked to Newmont stock
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering high-yield Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Newmont Corporation stock (NEM), maturing on March 17, 2028. These notes offer potential periodic contingent coupons with an example rate of 19.57% per annum, but investors risk losing a significant portion or all of their initial investment if the underlying stock performs poorly or if UBS defaults. The notes feature an automatic call mechanism and contingent principal repayment based on Newmont's stock performance relative to specified barriers and thresholds.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) issues autocallable notes maturing Mar 19, 2029 linked to FCX
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering $600,000 Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. with a maturity date of March 19, 2029. These notes provide contingent coupon payments if the underlying stock meets a specific barrier level and feature an automatic call if the stock reaches its initial level before maturity. Investors face significant risks, including potential loss of principal if the notes are not called and the final stock level falls below the downside threshold, as well as credit risk from UBS.

feed.title: Raymond James cuts Jefferson Capital stock price target on valuation
feed.summary: Raymond James revised its price target for Jefferson Capital Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:JCAP) from $25 to $22, while maintaining an Outperform rating, following the company's fourth-quarter 2025 results. Although adjusted diluted EPS of $0.69 slightly missed estimates, the company's full-year diluted EPS of $5.64, strong cash EBITDA, efficient collections, and attractive dividend yield of 4.72% support a positive medium-term outlook. The firm highlighted Jefferson Capital's strong financial health and strategic acquisitions, contrasting with Citizens' more optimistic $26 price target.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. Stock (ISIN: US6658591044) Holds Steady Amid Banking Sector Volatility
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp. (ISIN: US6658591044) is demonstrating resilience in a volatile banking sector, particularly appealing to European investors due to its asset servicing strength and fee-based revenue model. The company's focus on custody banking, asset servicing, and wealth management, along with a strong balance sheet and dividend growth, provides stability. Northern Trust's presence in European indices and its servicing of European clients further enhance its attractiveness for diversified portfolios.

feed.title: Context Therapeutics Adopts Shareholder-Friendly Board Governance Changes
feed.summary: Context Therapeutics (CNTX) has adopted significant shareholder-friendly board governance changes following a Delaware Court of Chancery ruling. Effective March 11, 2026, director terms will be one year, and directors can be removed with or without cause by a majority vote, replacing previous three-year terms and removal for cause only. The company's 2026 annual meeting on June 24, 2026, will reflect these changes, emphasizing increased investor influence, though TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates CNTX as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite a strong technical uptrend.

feed.title: F5 Shareholders Approve 2026 Incentive Plan and Governance Items
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) shareholders have approved the 2026 Incentive Award Plan, authorizing 3.5 million new shares for equity-based compensation and rolling over remaining shares from the previous plan. This move, along with a new Non-Employee Director Compensation Program, aims to attract and retain key leadership while aligning executive incentives with shareholder interests. The shareholders also elected eight directors and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor, demonstrating strong support for the company's governance and compensation strategies.

feed.title: Adaire Fox-Martin Sells 1,086 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
feed.summary: Adaire Fox-Martin, CEO of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX), sold 1,086 shares of the company's stock on March 12th for approximately $1.05 million, reducing her direct ownership to 19,574 shares. This followed an earlier sale of 2,670 shares in January. Despite missing recent quarterly earnings estimates, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Equinix, with an average price target of $1,006.91, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Charles Meyers Sells 305 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
feed.summary: Charles Meyers, Chairman of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX), sold 305 shares of the company's stock on March 12, 2026, for approximately $293,162.95, reducing his stake by 2.36%. The sale comes as Equinix increased its quarterly dividend, though its payout ratio is high at 150.11%, exceeding earnings. The company recently missed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a $1,006.91 consensus target price.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) EVP Sells 584 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Equinix EVP Raouf Abdel sold 584 shares of EQIX stock for approximately $563,963, reducing his position by 6.99%. This recent sale follows an earlier one in January. Despite missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, analysts maintain an "overweight" rating with a consensus target price of $1,006.91, and Equinix recently increased its quarterly dividend to $5.16 per share.

feed.title: Credo Technology Group (NASDAQ:CRDO) CTO Chi Fung Cheng Sells 27,500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Credo Technology Group's CTO, Chi Fung Cheng, sold 27,500 shares of CRDO stock for $3.234 million on March 11th, reducing his position by 0.44% but still holding over 6 million shares. This sale is part of a series of insider sales since December. Despite the insider selling, Credo recently reported strong earnings, with EPS of $1.07 and revenue of $407 million, exceeding analyst expectations, and the stock maintains a "Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $206.33.

feed.title: Waste Management's Devina Rankin resigns as CFO, receives $1M transition bonus
feed.summary: Devina Rankin resigned as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Waste Management, effective November 1, 2025, after 23 years with the company, including nearly nine years as CFO. She received a $1 million cash transition bonus on March 13, 2026. A successor has been appointed, though not yet disclosed.

feed.title: [Form 4] UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES INC President and CEO Marc D. Miller reported several insider trading activities on March 12, 2026. These included exercising options to acquire 100,425 shares of Class B Common Stock and receiving 63,036 shares through the vesting of performance-based RSUs. To cover taxes and exercise costs, Miller disposed of 110,850 shares, resulting in a direct holding of 363,907 Class B shares, with additional shares held indirectly through family trusts.

feed.title: Vita Coco (NASDAQ: COCO) chair’s trust sells 50,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: The Michael Kirban Revocable Trust, associated with Vita Coco (NASDAQ: COCO) Executive Chairman Michael Kirban, sold 50,000 shares of common stock at $58 per share on March 11–12, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Kirban retains substantial indirect ownership through this trust and another, as well as direct holdings and numerous stock options expiring between 2029 and 2035. The transactions are considered routine, signaling planned liquidity rather than opportunistic selling due to the pre-arranged nature of the 10b5-1 plan.

feed.title: Consumers Energy provides update on outages and repair efforts late Friday
feed.summary: Consumers Energy is actively addressing widespread power outages across Michigan caused by high winds, snow, sleet, and rain. Over 450 crews are on the ground, working to restore power, with efforts complicated by further challenging weather expected over the weekend. The company emphasizes safety and advises customers to stay updated through their outage center and alerts.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) missiles chief sells 4,620 shares
feed.summary: Timothy S. Cahill, President of Missiles & Fire Control at Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT), sold a total of 4,620 shares of common stock on March 11, 2026, through several open-market transactions. The shares were sold at weighted average prices ranging from $647.7432 to $655.8994 per share. Following these sales, Cahill directly holds 9,590.746 common shares and indirectly holds an additional 73.9491 shares through the company's savings plan.

feed.title: Bargain Alert: Wells Fargo and Goldman Sachs Look Deeply Oversold
feed.summary: Wells Fargo and Goldman Sachs have seen significant stock drops, falling roughly 20% from recent highs, putting them in technically oversold territory. Despite recent underperformance linked to earnings misses and broader market pressures, analysts remain broadly bullish, suggesting these declines might present a buying opportunity. The article highlights oversold RSI levels and positive analyst ratings as indicators that a recovery rally for both financial giants could be imminent.

feed.title: Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) CFO sells 2,959 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) EVP and CFO Sandeep Reddy reported the sale of 2,959 shares of company common stock at $399.60 per share on March 11, 2026. This transaction was carried out under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Additionally, 196 shares were withheld at $393.29 per share to cover tax obligations related to equity compensation, leaving Reddy with 9,687 shares directly owned after these transactions.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) COO logs routine tax-related share withholding in Form 4
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza's COO, Joseph Hugh Jordan, reported a routine tax-related share withholding in a recent Form 4 SEC filing. On March 11, 2026, 182 shares of common stock were withheld at $393.29 each to cover tax obligations, not an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Jordan directly holds 11,157.268 shares and indirectly holds 244.447 shares through a 401(k) savings plan.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza (NYSE: DPZ) EVP logs 1,745-share sale under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza EVP Cynthia A. Headen executed a pre-planned sale of 1,745 shares at $399.60 per share under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on August 18, 2025. Additionally, she disposed of 104 shares at $393.29 to cover tax obligations. After these transactions on March 11, 2026, she retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: Sempra Cancels Vista Pacifico LNG in the Aquarium of the World
feed.summary: Sempra has cancelled its proposed Vista Pacifico liquefied natural gas (LNG) project in Topolobampo, Sinaloa, marking a significant victory for environmentalists and local communities. This cancellation is the second of three major LNG projects planned for the Gulf of California, a region renowned for its biodiversity and dubbed the "aquarium of the world." The decision follows intense opposition from Mexican communities and U.S. supporters, including the NRDC, who raised concerns about the project's impact on climate, marine life, and local fisheries.

feed.title: John Morris sells STX shares via 10b5-1 plans (STX)
feed.summary: A recent Form 144 disclosure from Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC reported John Morris's sales of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) common stock under pre-arranged 10b5-1 plans. The filing details two sales: $98,400.00 for 240 shares on February 24, 2026, and $32,983.57 for 113 shares on December 15, 2025. Additionally, the document records Restricted Stock Units dated March 9, 2026.

feed.title: [144] Extra Space Storage Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC Form 144 filing by Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR). The filing indicates a proposed sale of 7,500 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $1,051,350.00 by an unnamed filer, acquired through Restricted Stock Awards on February 22, 2023.

feed.title: CRH Announces Intention to Delist from the LSE and Cancel Preference Shares
feed.summary: CRH (NYSE: CRH) has announced its intention to delist its ordinary shares and 7% preference shares from the London Stock Exchange (LSE) and, subject to shareholder approval, cancel its 5% and 7% preference shares. The company's primary listing moved to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) in September 2023, and the LSE delisting is expected to be effective from April 20, 2026, making NYSE its sole listing for ordinary shares. The proposed preference share cancellations involve cash payments to shareholders and require approval at upcoming shareholder meetings in May 2026.

feed.title: EQT Corp (EQT) EVP sells 7,634 shares at $64.35 each
feed.summary: EQT Corp's EVP Operations, J.E.B. Bolen, sold 7,634 shares of company common stock at an average price of $64.35 per share on March 12, 2026. Following this open-market transaction, Bolen directly holds 83,550 EQT common shares. This insider trading activity was reported via an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: EBAY's Chief Growth Officer Sells 15,000 Shares
feed.summary: Julie A Loeger, EBAY's Senior Vice President and Chief Growth Officer, sold 15,000 shares of common stock on March 12, 2026, for a total of $1,363,200 at a weighted average price of $90.88 per share. Following this transaction, Loeger directly holds 46,800 shares of EBAY. This information is based on an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: FedEx Corp Stock (ISIN: US3142111034) Faces Analyst Optimism Amid Tariff Headwinds and Freight Spin-Off Plans
feed.summary: FedEx stock dipped 2.29% to $353.13, yet Goldman Sachs raised its price target to $369, maintaining a Buy rating due to the company's resilience despite tariff risks and strategic restructuring. Analysts are optimistic about FedEx's prospects, highlighted by raised FY2026 EPS guidance and a planned FedEx Freight spin-off aimed at unlocking value. However, risks from potential new tariffs and geopolitical tensions, along with market volatility, warrant caution for investors.

feed.title: Credo Technology’s Stellar Q3 Signals Massive AI-Driven Growth​
feed.summary: Credo Technology (CRDO) reported exceptional Q3 FY2026 results with revenue surging 202% year-over-year, driven by increasing demand for AI-driven interconnect solutions and new product introductions like ZeroFlap optics. Despite a recent dip in stock price due to high investor expectations for forward guidance, the company's strategic acquisition of CoMira Solutions and expansion into AI infrastructure position it for sustained long-term growth. Analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, emphasizing the company's foundational strength in the AI and semiconductor industries.

feed.title: CuriosityStream (CURI) CEO receives 600K shares from RSU vesting, with tax withholding
feed.summary: CuriosityStream (CURI) CEO Clinton Larry Stinchcomb received 600,000 shares from the vesting of performance-based restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 11, 2026, after the company met specific 2025 revenue and free cash flow growth targets. In connection with this vesting, 196,738 common shares, valued at $3.27 per share, were withheld to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Stinchcomb directly owns 2,821,260 shares of CuriosityStream.

feed.title: Corsair Gaming releases Novablade Pro targeting tournament competitors
feed.summary: Corsair Gaming has launched the Novablade Pro, a high-end device designed for professional users and competitive gaming, praised by TechRadar for its luxury and performance. This release highlights Corsair's ongoing strategy to strengthen its position in the performance computing market. The company continues to expand its product lines and offer promotions, reinforcing its commitment to innovation and accessibility in the competitive tech landscape.

feed.title: Moody’s cuts WPP rating on weak earnings and high leverage
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has downgraded WPP Plc to Baa3 from Baa2, citing continued pressure on operating performance and elevated leverage. This decision reflects WPP's underperformance compared to peers, a 5.4% decline in revenue (less pass-through costs) in 2025, and an expected gross debt/EBITDA ratio between 4.2x and 4.5x over the next year. The stable outlook anticipates gradual operational improvement from 2027, driven by strategic transformation and cost savings.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class C Stock Surges on Needham Buy Rating Amid AI and Acquisition Momentum
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class C stock saw a surge after Needham & Company LLC reaffirmed its 'buy' rating with an ambitious $400 price target, citing confidence in Alphabet's AI advancements and strategic acquisitions like the $32 billion Wiz deal. The report highlights Alphabet's strong market cap, reasonable P/E ratio, and robust Q4 earnings, positioning it as a key play for European investors. Key drivers include significant AI integrations through Gemini and Google Cloud's enhanced security offerings from the Wiz acquisition, despite some insider selling and antitrust scrutiny risks.

feed.title: Cencora (COR) CFO exercises RSUs and uses shares for tax withholding
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. CFO James F. Cleary exercised restricted stock units for 12,623 shares of common stock. To cover tax obligations related to this vesting, 5,409 shares, valued at $350.30 per share, were withheld. Following these transactions, Cleary directly holds 160,357.3479 shares of Cencora common stock.

feed.title: Insider sell blocks at CF Industries (NYSE: CF) reported in Form 144 filings
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) insider W. Anthony Will has filed a Form 144 indicating proposed open-market sales of Common Stock. The filing details multiple blocks of shares to be sold throughout February and March 2026, totaling significant amounts on various dates. This Form 144 serves as a notice of intended sales and does not confirm the completion of these transactions.

feed.title: HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) director sells shares after option exercise
feed.summary: HP Inc. director Mary Anne Citrino exercised non-qualified stock options for 72,816 shares at $11.45 per share and subsequently sold 45,172 shares at a weighted average price of $18.47 per share. The sale was primarily to cover the exercise price and associated fees. Following these transactions, she directly holds 33,251 shares, including those from a dividend reinvestment plan.

feed.title: Rollins Inc Stock (ISIN: US7752741030) Faces Pressure Amid Institutional Selling and Retention Focus
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. stock is facing pressure due to a Q4 earnings miss, trading below key moving averages, and significant institutional selling. The company is, however, focusing on improving technician retention through its "The Rollins Way" initiative, which could stabilize margins and improve service quality. While analysts maintain a 'Moderate Buy' consensus, the stock's high valuation and institutional reductions signal caution for investors.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical hit by cybersecurity phishing incident
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, a surgical robotics firm, experienced a cybersecurity phishing incident that compromised customer business and contact information, as well as employee and corporate data. The company stated that its da Vinci, Ion, and digital platforms were unaffected, and its network infrastructure is segmented, keeping robotic systems and hospital customer networks separate. This incident follows a recent cyberattack on Stryker, which disrupted its global network, impacting order processing, shipping, and manufacturing.

feed.title: [8-K] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Reports Material Event | VZ SEC Filing - Form 8-K
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. has filed an 8-K report detailing changes to its revenue and operating metric reporting for its Consumer and Business segments, effective from the first quarter of 2026. Revenue will now be categorized into mobility and broadband service, wireless equipment, and other revenue. The company also announced that operating metrics will only be disclosed on a consolidated basis going forward, and provided unaudited historical 2025 financial data under the new format to aid investors.

feed.title: F5 (FFIV) investors back 2026 incentive plan, reelect board and ratify PwC
feed.summary: F5, Inc. shareholders recently approved the new 2026 Incentive Award Plan, which includes 3,500,000 new shares of common stock. They also reelected all eight director nominees, approved the advisory vote on executive compensation, and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for fiscal 2026. These outcomes support continuity in F5’s governance, compensation, and audit arrangements.

feed.title: U.S. Markets Decreased Friday; Ulta Beauty Fell Furthest
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes experienced declines on Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling 0.93%, the S&P 500 declining 0.61%, and the Nasdaq decreasing by 0.26%. Ulta Beauty Inc. (ULTA) notably saw a significant drop.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (NYSE: HCA) outlines 2026 virtual annual meeting agenda
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare has detailed the agenda for its 2026 virtual annual meeting of stockholders, scheduled for April 23, 2026. Key items for shareholder vote include the election of directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and two shareholder proposals concerning a report on healthcare consequences and the right to act by written consent. The company also highlighted its corporate governance practices and extensive corporate responsibility efforts, which include patient-centered care and community investments.
